title: Rocoto Relleno French-Peruvian Fusion
description: A French-Peruvian fusion dish featuring stuffed rocoto peppers with a rich, creamy bechamel sauce and melted cheese.
instructions: 2. Cut the tops off the rocoto peppers and remove the seeds and membranes.
3. In a pan, sauté the chopped onions and minced garlic until softened.
4. Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted.
5. Stuff each rocoto pepper with the cheese mixture.
6. In a separate pan, make a roux with the flour and butter.
7. Gradually add the bechamel sauce, whisking continuously.
8. Add the aji amarillo sauce and stir to combine.
9. Place the stuffed peppers in a baking dish and cover with the bechamel sauce.
10. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the peppers are tender and the sauce is bubbly.
11. Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
